title: How a Man of God Fights a Phone That's Already Winning
caption:
Your phone is winning right now. Not someday, not eventually. Today, at 1 a.m. last night, at the red light this morning.

That's not something to feel bad about. It's the starting point for the only fight worth having this year.

A detox ends by New Year's. A war doesn't end until the enemy's dead. Paul didn't say manage your flesh, he said war against it. "Our struggle is not against flesh and blood, but against the rulers, against the authorities, against the spiritual forces of evil." (Ephesians 6:12) Your phone is just where that fight shows up first.

So don't set a screen time limit and call it discipleship. Charge it across the room tonight. Open the Word before you open anything else tomorrow. Tell one brother the real number, not the rounded-down one.

God isn't asking you to win this alone. He's asking you to actually fight, and He finishes what He starts in you.

Save this for the next time it feels like the phone already has you.

#faith #christianmen #manofgod #discipline #spiritualwarfare #digitalhabits #godlymen #christianity #scripture #ephesians6
theme: He fights the phone like a war, not a detox.
title_shape: Identity in action, with a tension baked in
